---
title: "types.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/cachebro/packages/sdk/src/types.ts"
loc: 18
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.20
style_score: 9.54
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 9.73
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
Internal logic only.
